statements.__comment__: GCPCloudRunRevision no longer carries :Container (revisions are versioning artifacts with no ontology label). Strip stale :Container from pre-migration revisions.
GCPCloudRunJob no longer carries any ontology label (individual GCPCloudRunContainer children carry :Container). Strip stale :Container and :Function from pre-migration jobs.
GCPCloudRunService no longer carries :Function. It is now treated as an orchestrator (analogous to ECSService); its child GCPCloudRunContainer nodes carry :Container.

name: GCP Cloud Run ontology label migration
